name: Dine-in
shortDescription: Eat at any Aseer Time branch in Kuwait
description: Walk in to any of our Kuwait branches — Bneid Al Qar, Maidan Hawally, Salmiya 1 & 2, Jabriya, Jahra, Qurain, Sulaibikhat, Ardiya, Fahaheel, Khayran, Sabah Al Salem (24/7), Abu Ftaira, Abdullah Al-Salem. Free seating.

name: Takeaway
shortDescription: Order ahead & pick up at the branch
description: Place your order over WhatsApp or call the branch and we'll have it ready for pickup. No service fee.

name: Delivery via Talabat
description: Aseer Time is live on Talabat across all major Kuwait areas. Delivery fee + minimum order set by Talabat per branch.

name: Delivery via Deliveroo
description: Aseer Time is live on Deliveroo Kuwait (Salmiya, Bneid Al Qar and more). Delivery fee + minimum order set by Deliveroo per branch.

name: Delivery via Carriage
description: Aseer Time is live on Carriage Kuwait. Delivery fee + minimum order set by Carriage per branch.

name: Catering & Party Orders
description: Catering for offices, weddings and gatherings. Includes Hamba sharing platter, Mini Prestige 12-piece, 1L & 1.5L bottles, Zwara Box and Happiness Macintosh. 24-hour notice required.

name: Corporate Gifting
shortDescription: Branded gift boxes for clients & employees
description: Zwara Box, Happiness Macintosh and custom corporate gift tiers. Branded packaging available on request. Volume pricing for orders of 25+ units.

name: Birthday & Event Package
description: Birthday and celebration packages — combine signature mixes, sweets and a feature centrepiece. Includes setup at the branch or delivery to your location (within Kuwait).

name: WhatsApp Order Concierge
description: Order directly with us on WhatsApp +965 67090966 / +965 69063797 for catering, gifting and out-of-coverage delivery.

name: Franchise Partnership
shortDescription: Open your own Aseer Time branch
description: Franchise the Aseer Time, Papa Kunafa or Farooj Abu Al Abed brand. Investment from USD 500,000 (priced separately on application). 6–12 month timeline from application to grand opening. Includes site selection, training, marketing and ongoing operational support. Multi-unit and multi-brand development encouraged. Contact franchise@aseertime.com.
